name: WP-L12-dates-locale: locale-aware dates + UTC/local-day fixes
description: Findings: F-067 + F-072 (4 toLocaleDateString('en-US') hardcodes — dates render US-formatted in every locale) · F-177 (localDate computed in UTC via toISOString despite device-local name/intent) · F-178 (quiz-history date grouping/labeling mixes UTC and local time bases — off-by-one day labels). Full finding text: docs/audit/2026-05-29-full-audit/L-gap-delta.md (label l10n-a11y-mobile).
acceptanceCriteria: Dates render in the device/UI locale; day-bucketing consistent on a single declared time base; boundary-time tests (around midnight, TZ offsets) added.
riskImpact: S-M / timezone edge cases need tests.
bodyText:
Bundle brief (WP-L12-dates-locale)
Transcribed from the PRG-12 execution tracker §1 (_wip/l10n-a11y/execution-tracker.md @ 9570f5b63) — bundle #7 of 8. Children are absorbed provenance (lifecycle rides this parent): WI-659 / WI-660.
Bundle rationale
Date handling has two distinct defect classes traveling together: locale-blind formatting (US-formatted dates everywhere) and UTC/local-day boundary bugs (wrong day near midnight).
Strategy
Formatting: replace toLocaleDateString('en-US') hardcodes and locale-blind format calls with locale-aware formatting driven by the active i18n locale (one shared helper if ≥3 sites). Day-boundary: replace toISOString-based localDate computations with explicit local-day logic; reconcile the quiz date's mixed UTC/local boundaries to ONE deliberate convention (document which). Regression tests around midnight boundaries (red-green evidence).
Scope
In: F-067, F-072, F-177, F-178. Out: date COPY strings (WP-1/WP-4 surfaces); server-side date storage semantics.
Findings
F-067 — Dates formatted without locale awareness.
F-072 — 4 toLocaleDateString('en-US') hardcodes.
F-177 — localDate computed in UTC via toISOString — wrong day near midnight.
F-178 — Quiz date mixes UTC and local day boundaries.
Full finding text: docs/audit/2026-05-29-full-audit/L-gap-delta.md (label l10n-a11y-mobile).
Acceptance Criteria (bundle)
No locale-hardcoded date formatting remains; formatting follows the active locale (sweep-verified).
Day-boundary computations use one documented convention; midnight-boundary regression tests red-green verified.
Typecheck + related tests green.
Risk & blast radius
Low-medium — F-177/F-178 are behavior fixes (streaks/quiz days can shift for users near midnight UTC offsets; that is the CORRECT new behavior — note it in the completion summary). Disjoint from other bundles.
